com.hp.workpath.api.scanner

Enum ScanAttributes.ScanSize

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Enum<ScanAttributes.ScanSize>
      • com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes.ScanSize
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Comparable<ScanAttributes.ScanSize>
    Enclosing class:
    ScanAttributes

    public static enum ScanAttributes.ScanSize
extends java.lang.Enum<ScanAttributes.ScanSize>
    The scan size (i.e., size of the original) for scanning.

    This attribute is relative to the orientation parameter of scan.

    Since:
    API 1

    • Enum Constant Summary

      Enum Constants 
      Enum Constant and Description
      A3
      ISO A3 (297mm x 420mm)
      A4
      ISO A4 (210mm x 297mm)
      A4_ROTATE
      ISO A4 Rotated (297mm x 210mm)
      A5
      ISO/JIS A5 (148mm x 210mm)
      A5_ROTATE

      A6
      ISO A6 (105mm x 148mm)
      A6_ROTATE
      ISO A6 Rotated (148mm x 105mm)

      Auto detected size for scan (Any) A meta-type used to indicate auto-select

    • Enum Constant Detail

      • DEFAULT

        public static final ScanAttributes.ScanSize DEFAULT
        Default scanning size from printer. If the printer supports auto-detection, it will be used.
        Since:
        API 1

    • Method Detail

      • values

        public static ScanAttributes.ScanSize[] values()
        Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared. This method may be used to iterate over the constants as follows: 
        for (ScanAttributes.ScanSize c : ScanAttributes.ScanSize.values())
    System.out.println(c);
        Returns:
        an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared

      • valueOf

        public static ScanAttributes.ScanSize valueOf(java.lang.String name)
        Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
        Returns:
        the enum constant with the specified name
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if this enum type has no constant with the specified name
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if the argument is null

      • getHeight

        public double getHeight()
        Retrieves the height of paper
        Returns:

        supported height from ScanAttributes.ScanSize.

        • Return the supported height
        • Return can be 0.0 if PaperSize height is not supported

        Since:
        API 8

      • getWidth

        public double getWidth()
        Retrieves the width of paper
        Returns:

        supported width from ScanAttributes.ScanSize.

        • Return the supported width
        • Return can be 0.0 if PaperSize width is not supported

        Since:
        API 8

      • getUnit

        public java.lang.String getUnit()
        Retrieves the unit of paper
        Returns:

        supported unit from ScanAttributes.ScanSize.

        • Return the supported unit (mm or inch or cm) according to paper size.
        • Return can be null if PaperSize unit is not supported

        Since:
        API 8
